name: nong-toolkit
description: Nong.Toolkit.Net — 16 individual skills for agricultural document, literature, and paper workflows through the deterministic nong CLI. Modular architecture: light router + 6 auto-install external tools.

plugins.name: nong-toolkit
plugins.description: Full bundle: all 16 Nong.Toolkit.Net skills. Install individual skills for lower token cost.

plugins.name: word
plugins.description: Word document workflows through nong CLI — check, create, read, dissect, diagnose, clean-styles, format-gongwen, table-reflow, merge, protect, compare

plugins.name: pdf
plugins.description: PDF slicing and editing through nong CLI — check, dissect, render, images, merge, split, ocr

plugins.name: literature
plugins.description: Literature retrieval through nong lit — parse, validate, plan, search, export with OpenAlex/Crossref/Unpaywall

plugins.name: inspect
plugins.description: Agricultural paper inspection through nong inspect — diagnose, classify, structure, refs, evidence, data-req, gap, semantics, write-paper, write-official, official-check

plugins.name: excel
plugins.description: Excel operations through nong CLI — sheets, read, to-groups, create, dissect, style, formula, pivot

plugins.name: chart
plugins.description: Agricultural statistics and charts through nong chart — analyze, anova, duncan, bar, line, scatter, pie, boxplot, histogram, heatmap, radar

plugins.name: diagram
plugins.description: Scientific diagrams through nong diagram — flowchart, network, tree

plugins.name: pptx
plugins.description: PPTX inspection and creation through nong CLI — read, slides, dissect, create

plugins.name: ocr
plugins.description: OCR and image QA through nong ocr — local, cloud, check-env, analyze-image, models, install-model, to-word

plugins.name: genre
plugins.description: Writing template discovery through nong genre — list, show

plugins.name: icons
plugins.description: Scientific icon discovery through nong icons and Bioicons — list, search

plugins.name: slice
plugins.description: NongPandoc slice package inspection through nong slice — inspect, blocks, block, assets

plugins.name: skill-grader
plugins.description: Skill lifecycle gates through nong skill — validate, scan, inventory, package

plugins.name: skill-breeder
plugins.description: Skill authoring guide — templates, naming, reference structure

plugins.name: skill-tester
plugins.description: Skill quality testing — trigger precision, description accuracy, feedback loops

plugins.name: skill-pruner
plugins.description: Skill lifecycle governance — merge, split, deprecate
